summary: Full e2e testing of Krypton MVP - backend APIs and frontend UI all passing. 12/12 backend tests pass. All frontend sections render correctly. Chatbot (Claude Sonnet 4.5) responds on-topic in correct language. Contact form calls /api/contact and opens WhatsApp.

issues: AI replies render raw markdown asterisks (**bold**) instead of formatted text — chatbot message bubbles do not parse/render markdown. Consider adding a lightweight markdown renderer like react-markdown to the message bubble component.

action_items: Minor: Render markdown in chatbot message bubbles (Claude returns **bold** and bullet lists that render as raw text). Use react-markdown or a simple parser in Chatbot.jsx message display.
critical_code_review_comments: Chatbot.jsx: Messages display raw markdown asterisks — Claude returns formatted markdown but the UI renders it as plain text. Low priority but affects readability.
server.py: history_text context label is always in French ('Utilisateur'/'Assistant') regardless of language — minor but may affect non-French context.

App.js: hero-chat-btn links to #contact section (anchor) rather than triggering the chatbot panel — naming is slightly misleading (says 'Discuter avec l\'IA' but scrolls to contact form). Could open chatbot directly.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test contact leads (TEST_Jean Dupont, TEST_Minimal) via /api/contact during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows working. Only outstanding issue is markdown not rendered in chatbot bubbles. Backend 100% passing. Language switching works (EN hero text changes, AR sets dir=rtl). 13 sectors, 6 portfolio items, 4 process steps, 5 reviews all render. Contact form POSTs to /api/contact and opens WhatsApp. Chatbot correctly restricts to Krypton services.
